title: Загрузка типа и диспетчеризация: объект-тип, таблица методов

cards.prompt: A virtual call resolves through the method table of the instance's real type object (found via the header's type-object pointer), so Employee e = new Manager(); e.R() runs Manager's override and prints Manager
cards.code: using System; class Employee{ public virtual string R()=>"Employee"; } class Manager:Employee{ public override string R()=>"Manager"; } Employee e=new Manager(); Console.WriteLine(e.R());

cards.prompt: A type object is itself a heap object whose type is System.Type, so t.GetType() is assignable to Type — typeof(Type).IsAssignableFrom(t.GetType()) prints True
cards.code: using System; class C{} Type t = typeof(C); Console.WriteLine(typeof(Type).IsAssignableFrom(t.GetType()));

cards.prompt: The type-of-a-type recursion terminates at System.Type whose type object references itself, so t.GetType() and t.GetType().GetType() are the same reference — ReferenceEquals prints True
cards.code: using System; Type t = typeof(int); Console.WriteLine(object.ReferenceEquals(t.GetType(), t.GetType().GetType()));
